1730380.name: World of MiniMonsters
1730380.description:
World of Minimonsters is a creature collecting game. Capture your favourite Minimonsters and defeat your rivals in fast-paced battles across 20 levels.

Build your team of creatures and complete quests to earn gold and potions. Use these potions to upgrade any of your minimonsters' traits and take on your opponents on the battlefield. Each minimonster has its own strengths and weaknesses, so choose your minimonster well before combat to receive bonuses on attack or for your elemental blast, and use different types of abilities to win the victory.

Will you manage to defeat the lord of these lands in the last level?

GAMES'S FEATURES:
- 89 MiniMonsters (84 playable)
- 14 Different potions
- 39 Adventures
- 16 Battlegrounds
- 11 different skills that change the fate of the battle
- Random music for the main panel and battles

Have you already chosen your favorite MiniMonster?.
